chapter_title.en: Instructions to Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr, upon appointment as the governor of Egypt

text: ومن عهد له (عليه السلام) إلى محمد بن أبي بكر (رضي الله عنه) حين قلده مصر

en.sayed-ali-raza: Given to Muḥammad ibn Abī Bakr (may Allāh be pleased with him), when Amīr al-mu’minīn appointed him as the Governor of Egypt.
